tests/companion-browse.test.js

assertions changed view diff on GitHub ↗
↳ Not a weakening: the one changed assertion updates the music queue button's expected label from the old '🎵 Music Queue (2)' to the new compact '🎵 (2)' — the deliberate TASK-258 format change. The file also ADDS three assertions (one-row header layout, compact '🎬 (3)' video label, and a non-purple white border on the music button), so net test coverage increases.
